domain: Mobile-first small group learning platform for churches
emotional_tone: Warm, trustworthy, distraction-free, welcoming, and community-focused. The UI must feel grounded, tactile, and calm—never clinical or overwhelmingly tech-heavy.

rules.headings_alignment: Left-aligned for dashboard/app content; center-aligned only for marketing hero sections.
rules.font_weight: Avoid defaulting to bold. Use varying weights (e.g., medium, semibold) to establish hierarchy.
rules.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA contrast ratios against backgrounds.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than default to create a premium, calm environment.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grid protocol for the Home Dashboard. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons/badges to maintain an approachable, organic feel.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-border/60 rounded-2xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] hover:-translate-y-1
surface_styles.headers: bg-background_base/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/40 z-50 sticky top-0

restructuring_instructions.core_problem_solved: Consolidated 8 disconnected nav items into 4 unified core tabs, unifying the user experience and resolving RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) duplication.

global_navigation.mobile: Bottom Tab Navigation with 4 primary items: Home, Connect, Me, Manage (if Teacher/Admin).
global_navigation.desktop: Collapsible Sidebar Navigation with the same 4 primary items + Global Top Header.
global_navigation.global_header: Contains Global Search (CMD+K overlay, replacing standalone Search page), Notification Bell, and User Avatar Dropdown.

module_mapping.Home: Merges Dashboard and Courses. Structure: Hero 'This Week' card (span full width) + Bento grid of available/active courses.
module_mapping.Connect: Merges Chat and Messages into a Unified Inbox. Structure: Left pane (conversations list), Right pane (chat/message area). Top tabs toggle between 'Group Chat' and 'Direct Messages'.
module_mapping.Me: Merges Progress and Settings. Structure: Two-column layout on desktop. Left column: 'My Progress' (streak, completed lessons). Right column: 'Settings' categorized into logical cards (Account, App Preferences, Zoom, Notifications).
module_mapping.Manage: Merges Admin Panel, Teacher Dashboard, Attendance, and Security Log. ONLY visible to Teachers and Admins. Structure: Left-aligned vertical tabs for sub-sections: 'Members', 'Pending Approvals', 'Attendance Reports', 'Platform Stats', 'Security Audit Log' (fixing the hidden mobile bug by placing it clearly here for Admins).

components.forms: Use Shadcn forms. Inputs should have subtle backgrounds (bg-background_muted), no harsh borders, rounded-xl, and primary color focus rings (focus:ring-primary/50).
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors. Secondary buttons: bg-secondary text-white rounded-full.
components.search: Implement as a Shadcn Command palette (CMD+K) accessible from the global header, searching across courses, lessons, and discussions seamlessly.
components.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs for switching contexts (e.g., in Connect or Manage). Override default styles to be pill-shaped or soft-underlined, removing harsh boxy styles.

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in (opacity 0 to 1) and slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0) using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Active states should slightly scale down (scale: 0.98).
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Include aria-labels for all icons.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='bottom-nav-home', data-testid='connect-tab-direct', data-testid='search-cmd-k'.

auth_hero_background.description: Minimalist organic background for landing/login pages

community_group_1.description: A diverse small group community meeting, useful for marketing or course thumbnails

community_group_2.description: People collaborating, ideal for group chat headers or empty states

avatar_placeholder_1.description: Smiling person avatar, for user profile placeholders

avatar_placeholder_2.description: Young smiling person avatar, for member list placeholders
